allow: PowerShell($cmds = @\('py','python3','python'\); foreach \($c in $cmds\) { $g = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { "$c -> $\($g.Source\)" } else { "$c -> NOT FOUND" } }; "--- py versions ---"; try { py -0p 2>&1 } catch { "py launcher not available" })

Bash(".venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "import internfinder.sources.greenhouse as g, internfinder.sources.lever as l, internfinder.sources.ashby as a, internfinder.sources.schemaorg as s, internfinder.resume_parser as rp, internfinder.cache as c, internfinder.domain as d, internfinder.config as cf, internfinder.http_util as h; print\('imports OK'\); print\('lexicon terms:', len\(d.TECH_LEXICON\)\); print\('expand verilog ->', sorted\(d.expand_terms\({'verilog'}\).items\(\), key=lambda x:-x[1]\)[:6]\)")
